name: BrowserStack for Open Source
description: BrowserStack provides lifetime access to its full testing platform for open-source projects, including cross-browser, real device, and visual testing.

perks.title: Unlimited Testing
perks.description: Unlimited testing across 3,000+ browsers and real mobile devices.

perks.title: All BrowserStack Products
perks.description: Access to Live, Automate, Percy, App Live, Screenshots, and App Automate.

perks.title: 5 Concurrent Users
perks.description: 5 concurrent users and 5 parallels for faster testing and team collaboration.

eligibility: Must be an open-source project (web frameworks, libraries, web applications, or mobile apps).
applicationProcess: Sign up or log in on the BrowserStack open-source program page.
